arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres to Arsenal takes fresh twist as transfer clause confirmed by club chief
arts.sum: However, the Coventry owner, Doug King, has told talkSPORT that they will have to pay a significant amount of what the clause entitles them to Brighton, who the Sky Blues paid around £1million to sign Gyokeres approaching four years ago. Coventry Live has previously reported that it will earn the Sky Blues ten percent of the difference between the £20million they sold Gyokeres for and any fee Sporting receives.

arts.ttl: West Ham vs Arsenal – Match Preview and Team News
arts.sum: It’s East London against North London on Saturday evening, as West Ham face Arsenal at the London Stadium. The Hammers will be in good spirits following their 2-0 away victory over Newcastle on Monday night. arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe could help Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta to pull off sensational transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal have enquired about the availability of Real Madrid starlet Arda Guler, who is reportedly eyeing an exit from the Bernabeu following Kylian Mbappe's arrival

arts.ttl: Why Julen Lopetegui isn't on touchline for West Ham vs Arsenal as Premier League rules explained
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will be the only manager on the touchline when Arsenal face West Ham in the Premier League. The booking was Lopetegui's third caution of the season, which means he will serve a one-game touchline ban in the Premier League, which will be against Arsenal .

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta delivers shock assessment of Liverpool and Man City title challenges
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta assesses the Premier League title hopes of Arsenal, leaders Liverpool and reigning champions Man City.

arts.ttl: West Ham moving for January signing – Financial crisis can see quick move to Hammers
arts.sum: West Ham United have Lyon’s Georges Mikautadze on their radar, according to a report. The striker arrived at the Ligue 1 side from FC Metz in the summer window and signed a deal until 2028. He managed four goals and one assist from 16 games, which includes six starts. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Harry Redknapp agree on West Ham vs Arsenal score prediction
arts.sum: That may not matter according to Redknapp, however, who believes the likes of Martin Odegaard and Bukayo Saka should have enough quality to beat West Ham, with the former Tottenham manager predicting a 2-1 Arsenal win. Alan Shearer and Harry Redknapp believe Arsenal will come away from London Stadium with all three points on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea in 'four-way fight' for Borussia Dortmund star who 'dreams of Premier League move'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly among four Premier League clubs showing an interest in signing Borussia Dortmund winger Jamie Gittens.

arts.ttl: Red alert for Arsenal as €40m star dragged away from Arteta
arts.sum: While Arsenal get a Club Fit score of 73, PSG hit 76. PSG should be taken seriously be Arsenal as a rival for Marmoush not just because of the financial wealth of the club: they are also seen as a more suitable team for the striker to thrive in.
